lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order, and the car performs as if it were new.
Good condition.

Check out this fantastic ride! It's in great condition and has been well-maintained over the years. You'll love how smoothly it handles on the road. While it shows some light signs of use, it remains a reliable and stylish choice for anyone looking for a quality vehicle. Ready for many more miles of adventure!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for anyone needing reliable transportation. The exterior exhibits some expected wear for its age, including a few noticeable door dings, light scratches along the side panels, and some minor paint oxidation on the trunk lid. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows typical signs of use, such as slight staining on the carpets and minor wear on the steering wheel. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though the air conditioning takes a moment to get cold and the suspension feels a bit soft. It has been maintained regularly, but a buyer should expect to address some minor cosmetic and mechanical maintenance items soon.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior features a clean finish with only a few minor stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is tidy and smoke-free, with minimal wear on the upholstery and all electronics functioning as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. It offers a smooth driving experience and represents a reliable option for anyone seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows significant wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically absolute, it offers an uncompromised driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Hey everyone! 👋 I'm super excited to list my absolute pride and joy. This car is seriously in flawless shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this beauty from day one, keeping it spotless and always garaged. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, you've definitely found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions. Can't wait for it to find a great new home!

Presenting an investment-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This unit boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive double-VANOS overhaul, ensuring mechanical integrity at its 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with factory-spec bushings and a flawless variable M differential lock. Finished in concours-level paint with zero oxidation, the undercarriage reflects a climate-controlled history. A purist’s configuration with a precise six-speed manual gearbox, this vehicle offers telepathic steering feedback and optimal torsional rigidity, standing as a definitive example of peak Bavarian engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and climate-controlled preservation. This car is in showroom condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it was first delivered. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of perfection; the premium leather seats show zero wear or bolster compression, the carpets are spotless, and that distinct 'new car' aroma remains. Every switch, dial, and electronic feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts. The engine bay is remarkably clean, and the undercarriage reflects its history of fair-weather-only use. For the discerning buyer who demands a vehicle with no compromises, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a masterpiece of automotive maintenance.

Presenting an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle maintained to the highest possible standards. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical perfection, reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier investment-grade automobile. We invite discerning collectors and enthusiasts to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in peerless, showroom-quality condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it offers a flawless aesthetic paired with uncompromising mechanical integrity. This is a rare acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection in every detail.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this car is—it's practically brand new and has been pampered since day one. It drives like a dream and looks absolutely stunning inside and out. I've taken such good care of it, and I'm so excited for it to find a new home where it'll be just as loved! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presenting a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) finished in Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, it boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. The chassis remains rigid with zero oxidation, while the variable M differential lock ensures optimal torque distribution. Riding on staggered 19-inch Style 67 alloys, the suspension geometry is factory-spec, providing surgical turn-in precision. Inside, the Nappa leather remains supple, free of bolster wear or UV damage. A rare, turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Low mileage. Service records available. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, preserved in showroom condition since it left the dealership. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, dings, or scratches. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather seats are supple without a single crease, and the dash is free of any sun damage. Mechanically, it performs exactly as it did on day one, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with every service performed on time by certified technicians. It features a whisper-quiet engine, crisp transmission shifts, and a factory-fresh underside. Included are all original manuals, two master keys, and a comprehensive folder of service records. This is an unparalleled example for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This motorcar has been meticulously maintained to the highest automotive standards, exhibiting no discernible wear to the exterior or cabin. Its mechanical integrity is matched only by its pristine aesthetic, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. This represents a definitive example of the model, prepared for immediate delivery and rigorous inspection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to its immaculate interior appointments, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a truly peerless driving experience. We invite serious inquiries for a private viewing of this investment-grade motorcar.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total gem. This car is in truly incredible shape—it looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered, garage-kept, and is sparkling inside and out. If you're looking for that 'brand new' feeling without the brand new price tag, you've found it. Come take it for a spin, I promise you're going to love it!

Offering a definitive example of the E46 chassis, this M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Mechanically pristine, the engine underwent a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and preventative rod bearing replacement to ensure peak reciprocating mass integrity. The subframe is reinforced, maintaining optimal torsional rigidity for the precision-tuned suspension. Every factory VIN tag is present, and the exterior finish displays zero oxidation or micro-marring. The interior features showroom-quality Nappa leather and tactile, unworn switchgear. Mint condition. Garage kept. One owner. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no paint imperfections or road rash. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of wear, while the dashboard and controls look and feel brand new. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the precision-tuned suspension, functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a turn-key example that looks, smells, and drives exactly as it did when it first left the dealership.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. This is an investment-grade example that satisfies the most exacting requirements for quality and performance.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine, original interior. Meticulously maintained and mechanically flawless, it represents the pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hey there! You've absolutely gotta see this beauty! I’ve taken such incredible care of this car—it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. There isn't a single scratch or dent to be found, and the interior is still looking totally pristine. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new but at a much better price, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen is mechanically flawless, featuring a reinforced rear subframe and a perfectly calibrated limited-slip differential. The chassis maintains its factory-spec rigidity, riding on staggered forged alloys with no curb rash. The paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the interior demonstrates zero bolster wear or pixel degradation. Documented maintenance history confirms a recent valve adjustment and cooling system overhaul. A true collector-grade example of BMW’s finest naturally aspirated engineering.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Recent inspection passed.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' find, preserved in a state that rivals its original delivery day. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating that highlights the absence of any rock chips, swirls, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its history of being strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury; the premium hand-stitched leather remains supple and matte, free from any bolster wear or creasing, and still carries that distinct new-car aroma. All technological features, including the high-resolution infotainment system and climate controls, function with crisp precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been serviced exclusively by certified specialists with a full paper trail of preventative maintenance. The engine bay is immaculate, and the driving experience is tight, silent, and powerful, exactly as the engineers intended. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than a showroom-standard specimen, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical profile, reflective of a life spent in climate-controlled storage and under a rigorous maintenance regimen. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paintwork, remains in showroom condition. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.
